chapters.en: And said unto his servants, This is John the Baptist; he is risen from the dead; and therefore mighty works do shew forth themselves in him.

chapters.zh: 起先，希律为他兄弟腓力的妻子希罗底的缘故，把约翰拿住，锁在监里。
chapters.en: For Herod had laid hold on John, and bound him, and put in prison for Herodias' sake, his brother Philip's wife.

chapters.zh: 因为约翰曾对他说：你娶这妇人是不合理的。
chapters.en: For John said unto him, It is not lawful for thee to have her.

chapters.zh: 希律就想要杀他，只是怕百姓，因为他们以约翰为先知。
chapters.en: And when he would have put him to death, he feared the multitude, because they counted him as a prophet.

chapters.zh: 到了希律的生日，希罗底的女儿在众人面前跳舞，使希律欢喜。
chapters.en: But when Herod's birthday was kept, the daughter of Herodias danced before them, and pleased Herod.

chapters.zh: 希律就起誓，应许随他所求的给他。
chapters.en: Whereupon he promised with an oath to give her whatsoever she would ask.

chapters.zh: 女儿被母亲所使，就说：请把施洗约翰的头放在盘子里，拿来给我。
chapters.en: And she, being before instructed of her mother, said, Give me here John Baptist's head in a charger.

chapters.zh: 王便 } 忧愁，但因他所起的誓，又因同席的人，就吩咐给他；
chapters.en: And the king was sorry: nevertheless for the oath's sake, and them which sat with him at meat, he commanded to be given .

chapters.zh: 于是打发人去，在监里斩了约翰，
chapters.en: And he sent, and beheaded John in the prison.

chapters.zh: 把头放在盘子里，拿来给了女子；女子拿去给他母亲。
chapters.en: And his head was brought in a charger, and given to the damsel: and she brought to her mother.

chapters.zh: 约翰的门徒来，把尸首领去埋葬了，就去告诉耶稣。
chapters.en: And his disciples came, and took up the body, and buried it, and went and told Jesus.

chapters.zh: 耶稣听见了，就上船从那里独自退到野地里去。众人听见，就从各城里步行跟随他。
chapters.en: When Jesus heard , he departed thence by ship into a desert place apart: and when the people had heard , they followed him on foot out of the cities.

chapters.zh: 耶稣出来，见有许多的人，就怜悯他们，治好了他们的病人。
chapters.en: And Jesus went forth, and saw a great multitude, and was moved with compassion toward them, and he healed their sick.

chapters.zh: 天将晚的时候，门徒进前来，说：这是野地，时候已经过了，请叫众人散开，他们好往村子里去，自己买吃的。
chapters.en: And when it was evening, his disciples came to him, saying, This is a desert place, and the time is now past; send the multitude away, that they may go into the villages, and buy themselves victuals.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：不用他们去，你们给他们吃罢！
chapters.en: But Jesus said unto them, They need not depart; give ye them to eat.

chapters.zh: 门徒说：我们这里只有五个饼，两条鱼。
chapters.en: And they say unto him, We have here but five loaves, and two fishes.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：拿过来给我。
chapters.en: He said, Bring them hither to me.

chapters.zh: 于是吩咐众人坐在草地上，就拿著这五个饼，两条鱼，望著天祝福，擘开饼，递给门徒，门徒又递给众人。
chapters.en: And he commanded the multitude to sit down on the grass, and took the five loaves, and the two fishes, and looking up to heaven, he blessed, and brake, and gave the loaves to disciples, and the disciples to the multitude.

chapters.zh: 他们都吃，并且吃饱了；把剩下的零碎收拾起来，装满了十二个篮子。
chapters.en: And they did all eat, and were filled: and they took up of the fragments that remained twelve baskets full.

chapters.zh: 吃的人，除了妇女孩子，约有五千。
chapters.en: And they that had eaten were about five thousand men, beside women and children.

chapters.zh: 耶稣随即催门徒上船，先渡到那边去，等他叫众人散开。
chapters.en: And straightway Jesus constrained his disciples to get into a ship, and to go before him unto the other side, while he sent the multitudes away.

chapters.zh: 散了众人以后，他就独自上山去祷告。到了晚上，只有他一人在那里。
chapters.en: And when he had sent the multitudes away, he went up into a mountain apart to pray: and when the evening was come, he was there alone.

chapters.zh: 那时船在海中，因风不顺，被浪摇撼。
chapters.en: But the ship was now in the midst of the sea, tossed with waves: for the wind was contrary.

chapters.zh: 夜里四更天，耶稣在海面上走，往门徒那里去。
chapters.en: And in the fourth watch of the night Jesus went unto them, walking on the sea.

chapters.zh: 门徒看见他在海面上走，就惊慌了，说：是个鬼怪！便害怕，喊叫起来。
chapters.en: And when the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were troubled, saying, It is a spirit; and they cried out for fear.

chapters.zh: 耶稣连忙对他们说：你们放心！是我，不要怕！
chapters.en: But straightway Jesus spake unto them, saying, Be of good cheer; it is I; be not afraid.

chapters.zh: 彼得说：主，如果是你，请叫我从水面上走到你那里去。
chapters.en: And Peter answered him and said, Lord, if it be thou, bid me come unto thee on the water.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你来罢。彼得就从船上下去，在水面上走，要到耶稣那里去；
chapters.en: And he said, Come. And when Peter was come down out of the ship, he walked on the water, to go to Jesus.

chapters.zh: 只因见风甚大，就害怕，将要沉下去，便喊著说：主阿，救我！
chapters.en: But when he saw the wind boisterous, he was afraid; and beginning to sink, he cried, saying, Lord, save me.

chapters.zh: 耶稣赶紧伸手拉住他，说：你这小信的人哪，为甚么疑惑呢？
chapters.en: And immediately Jesus stretched forth hand, and caught him, and said unto him, O thou of little faith, wherefore didst thou doubt?

chapters.zh: 他们上了船，风就住了。
chapters.en: And when they were come into the ship, the wind ceased.

chapters.zh: 在船上的人都拜他，说：你真是神的儿子了。
chapters.en: Then they that were in the ship came and worshipped him, saying, Of a truth thou art the Son of God.

chapters.zh: 他们过了海，来到革尼撒勒地方。
chapters.en: And when they were gone over, they came into the land of Gennesaret.

chapters.zh: 那里的人一认出是耶稣，就打发人到周围地方去，把所有的病人带到他那里，
chapters.en: And when the men of that place had knowledge of him, they sent out into all that country round about, and brought unto him all that were diseased;

chapters.zh: 只求耶稣准他们摸他的衣裳 䍁 子；摸著的人就都好了。
chapters.en: And besought him that they might only touch the hem of his garment: and as many as touched were made perfectly whole.

chapters.zh: 那时，有法利赛人和文士从耶路撒冷来见耶稣，说：
chapters.en: Then came to Jesus scribes and Pharisees, which were of Jerusalem, saying,

chapters.zh: 你的门徒为甚么犯古人的遗传呢？因为吃饭的时候，他们不洗手。
chapters.en: Why do thy disciples transgress the tradition of the elders? for they wash not their hands when they eat bread.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：你们为甚么因著你们的遗传犯神的诫命呢？
chapters.en: But he answered and said unto them, Why do ye also transgress the commandment of God by your tradition?

chapters.zh: 神说：当孝敬父母；又说：咒骂父母的，必治死他。
chapters.en: For God commanded, saying, Honour thy father and mother: and, He that curseth father or mother, let him die the death.

chapters.zh: 你们倒说：无论何人对父母说：我所当奉给你的已经作了供献，
chapters.en: But ye say, Whosoever shall say to father or mother, a gift, by whatsoever thou mightest be profited by me;

chapters.zh: 他就可以不孝敬父母。这就是你们藉著遗传，废了神的诫命。
chapters.en: And honour not his father or his mother, . Thus have ye made the commandment of God of none effect by your tradition.

chapters.zh: 假冒为善的人哪，以赛亚指著你们说的预言是不错的。他说：
chapters.en: hypocrites, well did Esaias prophesy of you, saying,

chapters.zh: 这百姓用嘴唇尊敬我，心却远离我；
chapters.en: This people draweth nigh unto me with their mouth, and honoureth me with lips; but their heart is far from me.

chapters.zh: 他们将人的吩咐当作道理教导人，所以拜我也是枉然。
chapters.en: But in vain they do worship me, teaching doctrines the commandments of men.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就叫了众人来，对他们说：你们要听，也要明白。
chapters.en: And he called the multitude, and said unto them, Hear, and understand:

chapters.zh: 入口的不能污秽人，出口的乃能污秽人。
chapters.en: Not that which goeth into the mouth defileth a man; but that which cometh out of the mouth, this defileth a man.

chapters.zh: 当时，门徒进前来对他说：法利赛人听见这话，不服（原文是跌倒），你知道么？
chapters.en: Then came his disciples, and said unto him, Knowest thou that the Pharisees were offended, after they heard this saying?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：凡栽种的物，若不是我天父栽种的，必要拔出来。
chapters.en: But he answered and said, Every plant, which my heavenly Father hath not planted, shall be rooted up.

chapters.zh: 任凭他们罢！他们是瞎眼领路的；若是瞎子领瞎子，两个人都要掉在坑里。
chapters.en: Let them alone: they be blind leaders of the blind. And if the blind lead the blind, both shall fall into the ditch.

chapters.zh: 彼得对耶稣说：请将这比喻讲给我们听。
chapters.en: Then answered Peter and said unto him, Declare unto us this parable.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们到如今还不明白么？
chapters.en: And Jesus said, Are ye also yet without understanding?

chapters.zh: 岂不知凡入口的，是运到肚子里，又落在茅厕里么？
chapters.en: Do not ye yet understand, that whatsoever entereth in at the mouth goeth into the belly, and is cast out into the draught?

chapters.zh: 惟独出口的，是从心里发出来的，这才污秽人。
chapters.en: But those things which proceed out of the mouth come forth from the heart; and they defile the man.

chapters.zh: 因为从心里发出来的，有恶念、凶杀、奸淫、苟合、偷盗、妄证、谤讟。
chapters.en: For out of the heart proceed evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, fornications, thefts, false witness, blasphemies:

chapters.zh: 这都是污秽人的；至于不洗手吃饭，那却不污秽人。
chapters.en: These are which defile a man: but to eat with unwashen hands defileth not a man.

chapters.zh: 耶稣离开那里，退到推罗、西顿的境内去。
chapters.en: Then Jesus went thence, and departed into the coasts of Tyre and Sidon.

chapters.zh: 有一个迦南妇人，从那地方出来，喊著说：主阿，大卫的子孙，可怜我！我女儿被鬼附得甚苦。
chapters.en: And, behold, a woman of Canaan came out of the same coasts, and cried unto him, saying, Have mercy on me, O Lord, Son of David; my daughter is grievously vexed with a devil.

chapters.zh: 耶稣却一言不答。门徒进前来，求他说：这妇人在我们后头喊叫，请打发他走罢。
chapters.en: But he answered her not a word. And his disciples came and besought him, saying, Send her away; for she crieth after us.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我奉差遣不过是到以色列家迷失的羊那里去。
chapters.en: But he answered and said, I am not sent but unto the lost sheep of the house of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那妇人来拜他，说：主阿，帮助我！
chapters.en: Then came she and worshipped him, saying, Lord, help me.

chapters.zh: 他回答说：不好拿儿女的饼丢给狗吃。
chapters.en: But he answered and said, It is not meet to take the children's bread, and to cast to dogs.

chapters.zh: 妇人说：主阿，不错；但是狗也吃他主人桌子上掉下来的碎渣儿。
chapters.en: And she said, Truth, Lord: yet the dogs eat of the crumbs which fall from their masters' table.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：妇人，你的信心是大的！照你所要的，给你成全了罢。从那时候，他女儿就好了。
chapters.en: Then Jesus answered and said unto her, O woman, great thy faith: be it unto thee even as thou wilt. And her daughter was made whole from that very hour.

chapters.zh: 耶稣离开那地方，来到靠近加利利的海边，就上山坐下。
chapters.en: And Jesus departed from thence, and came nigh unto the sea of Galilee; and went up into a mountain, and sat down there.

chapters.zh: 有许多人到他那里，带著瘸子、瞎子、哑吧、有残疾的，和好些别的病人，都放在他脚前；他就治好了他们。
chapters.en: And great multitudes came unto him, having with them lame, blind, dumb, maimed, and many others, and cast them down at Jesus' feet; and he healed them:

chapters.zh: 甚至众人都希奇；因为看见哑吧说话，残疾的痊愈，瘸子行走，瞎子看见，他们就归荣耀给以色列的神。
chapters.en: Insomuch that the multitude wondered, when they saw the dumb to speak, the maimed to be whole, the lame to walk, and the blind to see: and they glorified the God of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶稣叫门徒来，说：我怜悯这众人，因为他们同我在这里已经三天，也没有吃的了。我不愿意叫他们饿著回去，恐怕在路上困乏。
chapters.en: Then Jesus called his disciples , and said, I have compassion on the multitude, because they continue with me now three days, and have nothing to eat: and I will not send them away fasting, lest they faint in the way.

chapters.zh: 门徒说：我们在这野地，那里有这么多的饼叫这许多人吃饱呢？
chapters.en: And his disciples say unto him, Whence should we have so much bread in the wilderness, as to fill so great a multitude?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们有多少饼？他们说：有七个，还有几条小鱼。
chapters.en: And Jesus saith unto them, How many loaves have ye? And they said, Seven, and a few little fishes.

chapters.zh: 他就吩咐众人坐在地上，
chapters.en: And he commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground.

chapters.zh: 拿著这七个饼和几条鱼，祝谢了，擘开，递给门徒；门徒又递给众人。
chapters.en: And he took the seven loaves and the fishes, and gave thanks, and brake , and gave to his disciples, and the disciples to the multitude.

chapters.zh: 众人都吃，并且吃饱了，收拾剩下的零碎，装满了七个筐子。
chapters.en: And they did all eat, and were filled: and they took up of the broken that was left seven baskets full.

chapters.zh: 吃的人，除了妇女孩子，共有四千。
chapters.en: And they that did eat were four thousand men, beside women and children.

chapters.zh: 耶稣叫众人散去，就上船，来到马加丹的境界。
chapters.en: And he sent away the multitude, and took ship, and came into the coasts of Magdala.

chapters.zh: 法利赛人和撒都该人来试探耶稣，请他从天上显个神迹给他们看。
chapters.en: The Pharisees also with the Sadducees came, and tempting desired him that he would shew them a sign from heaven.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：晚上天发红，你们就说：天必要晴。
chapters.en: He answered and said unto them, When it is evening, ye say, fair weather: for the sky is red.

chapters.zh: 早晨天发红，又发黑，你们就说：今日必有风雨。你们知道分辨天上的气色，倒不能分辨这时候的神迹。
chapters.en: And in the morning, foul weather to day: for the sky is red and lowring. O hypocrites, ye can discern the face of the sky; but can ye not the signs of the times?

chapters.zh: 一个邪恶淫乱的世代求神迹，除了约拿的神迹以外，再没有神迹给他看。耶稣就离开他们去了。
chapters.en: A wicked and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given unto it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas. And he left them, and departed.

chapters.zh: 门徒渡到那边去，忘了带饼。
chapters.en: And when his disciples were come to the other side, they had forgotten to take bread.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：你们要谨慎，防备法利赛人和撒都该人的酵。
chapters.en: Then Jesus said unto them, Take heed and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees.

chapters.zh: 门徒彼此议论说：这是因为我们没有带饼罢。
chapters.en: And they reasoned among themselves, saying, because we have taken no bread.

chapters.zh: 耶稣看出来，就说：你们这小信的人，为甚么因为没有饼彼此议论呢？
chapters.en: when Jesus perceived, he said unto them, O ye of little faith, why reason ye among yourselves, because ye have brought no bread?

chapters.zh: 你们还不明白么？不记得那五个饼分给五千人、又收拾了多少篮子的零碎么？
chapters.en: Do ye not yet understand, neither remember the five loaves of the five thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?

chapters.zh: 也不记得那七个饼分给四千人、又收拾了多少筐子的零碎么？
chapters.en: Neither the seven loaves of the four thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?

chapters.zh: 我对你们说：要防备法利赛人和撒都该人的酵，这话不是指著饼说的，你们怎么不明白呢？
chapters.en: How is it that ye do not understand that I spake not to you concerning bread, that ye should beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees?

chapters.zh: 门徒这才晓得他说的不是叫他们防备饼的酵，乃是防备法利赛人和撒都该人的教训。
chapters.en: Then understood they how that he bade not beware of the leaven of bread, but of the doctrine of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees.

chapters.zh: 耶稣到了该撒利亚腓立比的境内，就问门徒说：人说我（有古卷没有我字）人子是谁？
chapters.en: When Jesus came into the coasts of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, saying, Whom do men say that I the Son of man am?

chapters.zh: 他们说：有人说是施洗的约翰；有人说是以利亚；又有人说是耶利米或是先知里的一位。
chapters.en: And they said, Some John the Baptist: some, Elias; and others, Jeremias, or one of the prophets.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你们说我是谁？
chapters.en: He saith unto them, But whom say ye that I am?

chapters.zh: 西门彼得回答说：你是基督，是永生神的儿子。
chapters.en: And Simon Peter answered and said, Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：西门巴约拿，你是有福的！因为这不是属血肉的指示你的，乃是我在天上的父指示的。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered and said unto him, Blessed art thou, Simon Barjona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven.

chapters.zh: 我还告诉你，你是彼得，我要把我的教会建造在这磐石上；阴间的权柄（权柄：原文是门），不能胜过他。
chapters.en: And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it.

chapters.zh: 我要把天国的钥匙给你，凡你在地上所捆绑的，在天上也要捆绑；凡你在地上所释放的，在天上也要释放。
chapters.en: And I will give unto thee the keys of the kingdom of heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.

chapters.zh: 当下，耶稣嘱咐门徒，不可对人说他是基督。
chapters.en: Then charged he his disciples that they should tell no man that he was Jesus the Christ.

chapters.zh: 从此，耶稣才指示门徒，他必须上耶路撒冷去，受长老、祭司长、文士许多的苦，并且被杀，第三日复活。
chapters.en: From that time forth began Jesus to shew unto his disciples, how that he must go unto Jerusalem, and suffer many things of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and be raised again the third day.

chapters.zh: 彼得就拉著他，劝他说：主阿，万不可如此！这事必不临到你身上。
chapters.en: Then Peter took him, and began to rebuke him, saying, Be it far from thee, Lord: this shall not be unto thee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣转过来，对彼得说：撒但，退我后边去罢！你是绊我脚的；因为你不体贴神的意思，只体贴人的意思。
chapters.en: But he turned, and said unto Peter, Get thee behind me, Satan: thou art an offence unto me: for thou savourest not the things that be of God, but those that be of men.

chapters.zh: 于是耶稣对门徒说：若有人要跟从我，就当舍己，背起他的十字架来跟从我。
chapters.en: Then said Jesus unto his disciples, If any will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.

chapters.zh: 因为，凡要救自己生命（生命：或作灵魂；下同）的，必丧掉生命；凡为我丧掉生命的，必得著生命。
chapters.en: For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for my sake shall find it.

chapters.zh: 人若赚得全世界，赔上自己的生命，有甚么益处呢？人还能拿甚么换生命呢？
chapters.en: For what is a man profited, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? or what shall a man give in exchange for his soul?

chapters.zh: 人子要在他父的荣耀里，同著众使者降临；那时候，他要照各人的行为报应各人。
chapters.en: For the Son of man shall come in the glory of his Father with his angels; and then he shall reward every man according to his works.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，站在这里的，有人在没尝死味以前必看见人子降临在他的国里。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, There be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the Son of man coming in his kingdom.

chapters.zh: 过了六天，耶稣带著彼得、雅各，和雅各的兄弟约翰，暗暗的上了高山，
chapters.en: And after six days Jesus taketh Peter, James, and John his brother, and bringeth them up into an high mountain apart,

chapters.zh: 就在他们面前变了形像，脸面明亮如日头，衣裳洁白如光。
chapters.en: And was transfigured before them: and his face did shine as the sun, and his raiment was white as the light.

chapters.zh: 忽然，有摩西、以利亚向他们显现，同耶稣说话。
chapters.en: And, behold, there appeared unto them Moses and Elias talking with him.

chapters.zh: 彼得对耶稣说：主阿，我们在这里真好！你若愿意，我就在这里搭三座棚，一座为你，一座为摩西，一座为以利亚。
chapters.en: Then answered Peter, and said unto Jesus, Lord, it is good for us to be here: if thou wilt, let us make here three tabernacles; one for thee, and one for Moses, and one for Elias.

chapters.zh: 说话之间，忽然有一朵光明的云彩遮盖他们，且有声音从云彩里出来，说：这是我的爱子，我所喜悦的。你们要听他！
chapters.en: While he yet spake, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them: and behold a voice out of the cloud, which said, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased; hear ye him.

chapters.zh: 门徒听见 ﹐ 就俯伏在地，极其害怕。
chapters.en: And when the disciples heard , they fell on their face, and were sore afraid.

chapters.zh: 耶稣进前来，摸他们，说：起来，不要害怕！
chapters.en: And Jesus came and touched them, and said, Arise, and be not afraid.

chapters.zh: 他们举目不见一人，只见耶稣在那里。
chapters.en: And when they had lifted up their eyes, they saw no man, save Jesus only.

chapters.zh: 下山的时候，耶稣吩咐他们说：人子还没有从死里复活，你们不要将所看见的告诉人。
chapters.en: And as they came down from the mountain, Jesus charged them, saying, Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead.

chapters.zh: 门徒问耶稣说：文士为甚么说以利亚必须先来？
chapters.en: And his disciples asked him, saying, Why then say the scribes that Elias must first come?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：以利亚固然先来，并要复兴万事；
chapters.en: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore all things.

chapters.zh: 只是我告诉你们，以利亚已经来了，人却不认识他，竟任意待他。人子也将要这样受他们的害。
chapters.en: But I say unto you, That Elias is come already, and they knew him not, but have done unto him whatsoever they listed. Likewise shall also the Son of man suffer of them.

chapters.zh: 门徒这才明白耶稣所说的是指著施洗的约翰。
chapters.en: Then the disciples understood that he spake unto them of John the Baptist.

chapters.zh: 耶稣和门徒到了众人那里，有一个人来见耶稣，跪下，说：
chapters.en: And when they were come to the multitude, there came to him a man, kneeling down to him, and saying,

chapters.zh: 主阿，怜悯我的儿子。他害癫痫的病很苦，屡次跌在火里，屡次跌在水里。
chapters.en: Lord, have mercy on my son: for he is lunatick, and sore vexed: for ofttimes he falleth into the fire, and oft into the water.

chapters.zh: 我带他到你门徒那里，他们却不能医治他。
chapters.en: And I brought him to thy disciples, and they could not cure him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：嗳！这又不信又悖谬的世代阿，我在你们这里要到几时呢？我忍耐你们要到几时呢？把他带到我这里来罢！
chapters.en: Then Jesus answered and said, O faithless and perverse generation, how long shall I be with you? how long shall I suffer you? bring him hither to me.

chapters.zh: 耶稣斥责那鬼，鬼就出来；从此孩子就痊愈了。
chapters.en: And Jesus rebuked the devil; and he departed out of him: and the child was cured from that very hour.

chapters.zh: 门徒暗暗的到耶稣跟前，说：我们为甚么不能赶出那鬼呢？
chapters.en: Then came the disciples to Jesus apart, and said, Why could not we cast him out?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：是因你们的信心小。我实在告诉你们，你们若有信心，像一粒芥菜种，就是对这座山说：你从这边挪到那边。他也必挪去；并且你们没有一件不能做的事了。
chapters.en: And Jesus said unto them, Because of your unbelief: for verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.

chapters.zh: 至于这一类的鬼，若不祷告、禁食，他就不出来（或作：不能赶他出来）。
chapters.en: Howbeit this kind goeth not out but by prayer and fasting.

chapters.zh: 他们还住在加利利的时候，耶稣对门徒说：人子将要被交在人手里。
chapters.en: And while they abode in Galilee, Jesus said unto them, The Son of man shall be betrayed into the hands of men:

chapters.zh: 他们要杀害他，第三日他要复活。门徒就大大的忧愁。
chapters.en: And they shall kill him, and the third day he shall be raised again. And they were exceeding sorry.

chapters.zh: 到了迦百农，有收丁税的人来见彼得，说：你们的先生不纳丁税（丁税约有半块钱）么？
chapters.en: And when they were come to Capernaum, they that received tribute came to Peter, and said, Doth not your master pay tribute?

chapters.zh: 彼得说：纳。他进了屋子，耶稣先向他说：西门 ﹐ 你的意思如何？世上的君王向谁征收关税、丁税？是向自己的儿子呢？是向外人呢？
chapters.en: He saith, Yes. And when he was come into the house, Jesus prevented him, saying, What thinkest thou, Simon? of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers?

chapters.zh: 彼得说：是向外人。耶稣说：既然如此，儿子就可以免税了。
chapters.en: Peter saith unto him, Of strangers. Jesus saith unto him, Then are the children free.

chapters.zh: 但恐怕触犯（触犯：原文是绊倒）他们，你且往海边去钓鱼，把先钓上来的鱼拿起来，开了他的口，必得一块钱，可以拿去给他们，作你我的税银。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding, lest we should offend them, go thou to the sea, and cast an hook, and take up the fish that first cometh up; and when thou hast opened his mouth, thou shalt find a piece of money: that take, and give unto them for me and thee.

chapters.zh: 当时，门徒进前来，问耶稣说：天国里谁是最大的？
chapters.en: At the same time came the disciples unto Jesus, saying, Who is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven?

chapters.zh: 耶稣便叫一个小孩子来，使他站在他们当中，
chapters.en: And Jesus called a little child unto him, and set him in the midst of them,

chapters.zh: 说：我实在告诉你们，你们若不回转，变成小孩子的样式，断不得进天国。
chapters.en: And said, Verily I say unto you, Except ye be converted, and become as little children, ye shall not enter into the kingdom of heaven.

chapters.zh: 所以，凡自己谦卑像这小孩子的，他在天国里就是最大的。
chapters.en: Whosoever therefore shall humble himself as this little child, the same is greatest in the kingdom of heaven.

chapters.zh: 凡为我的名接待一个像这小孩子的，就是接待我。
chapters.en: And whoso shall receive one such little child in my name receiveth me.

chapters.zh: 凡使这信我的一个小子跌倒的，倒不如把大磨石拴在这人的颈项上，沉在深海里。
chapters.en: But whoso shall offend one of these little ones which believe in me, it were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and he were drowned in the depth of the sea.

chapters.zh: 这世界有祸了，因为将人绊倒；绊倒人的事是免不了的，但那绊倒人的有祸了！
chapters.en: Woe unto the world because of offences! for it must needs be that offences come; but woe to that man by whom the offence cometh!

chapters.zh: 倘若你一只手，或是一只脚，叫你跌倒，就砍下来丢掉。你缺一只手，或是一只脚，进入永生，强如有两手两脚被丢在永火里。
chapters.en: Wherefore if thy hand or thy foot offend thee, cut them off, and cast from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life halt or maimed, rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into everlasting fire.

chapters.zh: 倘若你一只眼叫你跌倒，就把他剜出来丢掉。你只有一只眼进入永生，强如有两只眼被丢在地狱的火里。
chapters.en: And if thine eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life with one eye, rather than having two eyes to be cast into hell fire.

chapters.zh: 你们要小心，不可轻看这小子里的一个；我告诉你们，他们的使者在天上，常见我天父的面。（有古卷在此有
chapters.en: Take heed that ye despise not one of these little ones; for I say unto you, That in heaven their angels do always behold the face of my Father which is in heaven.

chapters.zh: 人子来，为要拯救失丧的人。）
chapters.en: For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.

chapters.zh: 一个人若有一百只羊，一只走迷了路，你们的意思如何？他岂不撇下这九十九只，往山里去找那只迷路的羊么？
chapters.en: How think ye? if a man have an hundred sheep, and one of them be gone astray, doth he not leave the ninety and nine, and goeth into the mountains, and seeketh that which is gone astray?

chapters.zh: 若是找著了，我实在告诉你们，他为这一只羊欢喜，比为那没有迷路的九十九只欢喜还大呢！
chapters.en: And if so be that he find it, verily I say unto you, he rejoiceth more of that , than of the ninety and nine which went not astray.

chapters.zh: 你们在天上的父也是这样，不愿意这小子里失丧一个。
chapters.en: Even so it is not the will of your Father which is in heaven, that one of these little ones should perish.

chapters.zh: 倘若你的弟兄得罪你，你就去，趁著只有他和你在一处的时候，指出他的错来。他若听你，你便得了你的弟兄；
chapters.en: Moreover if thy brother shall trespass against thee, go and tell him his fault between thee and him alone: if he shall hear thee, thou hast gained thy brother.

chapters.zh: 他若不听，你就另外带一两个人同去，要凭两三个人的口作见证，句句都可定准。
chapters.en: But if he will not hear take with thee one or two more, that in the mouth of two or three witnesses every word may be established.

chapters.zh: 若是不听他们，就告诉教会；若是不听教会，就看他像外邦人和税吏一样。
chapters.en: And if he shall neglect to hear them, tell unto the church: but if he neglect to hear the church, let him be unto thee as an heathen man and a publican.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，凡你们在地上所捆绑的，在天上也要捆绑；凡你们在地上所释放的，在天上也要释放。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever ye shall loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.

chapters.zh: 我又告诉你们，若是你们中间有两个人在地上同心合意的求甚么事，我在天上的父必为他们成全。
chapters.en: Again I say unto you, That if two of you shall agree on earth as touching any thing that they shall ask, it shall be done for them of my Father which is in heaven.

chapters.zh: 因为无论在那里，有两三个人奉我的名聚会，那里就有我在他们中间。
chapters.en: For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them.

chapters.zh: 那时，彼得进前来，对耶稣说：主阿，我弟兄得罪我，我当饶恕他几次呢？到七次可以么？
chapters.en: Then came Peter to him, and said, Lord, how oft shall my brother sin against me, and I forgive him? till seven times?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我对你说，不是到七次，乃是到七十个七次。
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto him, I say not unto thee, Until seven times: but, Until seventy times seven.

chapters.zh: 天国好像一个王要和他仆人算账。
chapters.en: Therefore is the kingdom of heaven likened unto a certain king, which would take account of his servants.

chapters.zh: 才算的时候，有人带了一个欠一千万银子的来。
chapters.en: And when he had begun to reckon, one was brought unto him, which owed him ten thousand talents.

chapters.zh: 因为他没有甚么偿还之物，主人吩咐把他和他妻子儿女，并一切所有的都卖了偿还。
chapters.en: But forasmuch as he had not to pay, his lord commanded him to be sold, and his wife, and children, and all that he had, and payment to be made.

chapters.zh: 那仆人就俯伏拜他，说：主阿，宽容我，将来我都要还清。
chapters.en: The servant therefore fell down, and worshipped him, saying, Lord, have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.

chapters.zh: 那仆人的主人就动了慈心，把他释放了，并且免了他的债。
chapters.en: Then the lord of that servant was moved with compassion, and loosed him, and forgave him the debt.

chapters.zh: 那仆人出来，遇见他的一个同伴欠他十两银子，便揪著他，掐住他的喉咙，说：你把所欠的还我！
chapters.en: But the same servant went out, and found one of his fellowservants, which owed him an hundred pence: and he laid hands on him, and took by the throat, saying, Pay me that thou owest.

chapters.zh: 他的同伴就俯伏央求他，说：宽容我罢，将来我必还清。
chapters.en: And his fellowservant fell down at his feet, and besought him, saying, Have patience with me, and I will pay thee all.

chapters.zh: 他不肯，竟去把他下在监里，等他还了所欠的债。
chapters.en: And he would not: but went and cast him into prison, till he should pay the debt.

chapters.zh: 众同伴看见他所做的事就甚忧愁，去把这事都告诉了主人。
chapters.en: So when his fellowservants saw what was done, they were very sorry, and came and told unto their lord all that was done.

chapters.zh: 于是主人叫了他来，对他说：你这恶奴才！你央求我，我就把你所欠的都免了，
chapters.en: Then his lord, after that he had called him, said unto him, O thou wicked servant, I forgave thee all that debt, because thou desiredst me:

chapters.zh: 你不应当怜恤你的同伴，像我怜恤你么？
chapters.en: Shouldest not thou also have had compassion on thy fellowservant, even as I had pity on thee?

chapters.zh: 主人就大怒，把他交给掌刑的，等他还清了所欠的债。
chapters.en: And his lord was wroth, and delivered him to the tormentors, till he should pay all that was due unto him.

chapters.zh: 你们各人若不从心里饶恕你的弟兄，我天父也要这样待你们了。
chapters.en: So likewise shall my heavenly Father do also unto you, if ye from your hearts forgive not every one his brother their trespasses.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说完了这些话，就离开加利利，来到犹太的境界约但河外。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jesus had finished these sayings, he departed from Galilee, and came into the coasts of Judaea beyond Jordan;

chapters.zh: 有许多人跟著他，他就在那里把他们的病人治好了。
chapters.en: And great multitudes followed him; and he healed them there.

chapters.zh: 有法利赛人来试探耶稣，说：人无论甚么缘故都可以休妻么？
chapters.en: The Pharisees also came unto him, tempting him, and saying unto him, Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife for every cause?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：那起初造人的，是造男造女，
chapters.en: And he answered and said unto them, Have ye not read, that he which made at the beginning made them male and female,

chapters.zh: 并且说：因此，人要离开父母，与妻子连合，二人成为一体。这经你们没有念过么？
chapters.en: And said, For this cause shall a man leave father and mother, and shall cleave to his wife: and they twain shall be one flesh?

chapters.zh: 既然如此，夫妻不再是两个人，乃是一体的了。所以，神配合的，人不可分开。
chapters.en: Wherefore they are no more twain, but one flesh. What therefore God hath joined together, let not man put asunder.

chapters.zh: 法利赛人说：这样，摩西为甚么吩咐给妻子休书，就可以休他呢？
chapters.en: They say unto him, Why did Moses then command to give a writing of divorcement, and to put her away?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：摩西因为你们的心硬，所以许你们休妻，但起初并不是这样。
chapters.en: He saith unto them, Moses because of the hardness of your hearts suffered you to put away your wives: but from the beginning it was not so.

chapters.zh: 我告诉你们，凡休妻另娶的，若不是为淫乱的缘故，就是犯奸淫了；有人娶那被休的妇人，也是犯奸淫了。
chapters.en: And I say unto you, Whosoever shall put away his wife, except for fornication, and shall marry another, committeth adultery: and whoso marrieth her which is put away doth commit adultery.

chapters.zh: 门徒对耶稣说：人和妻子既是这样，倒不如不娶。
chapters.en: His disciples say unto him, If the case of the man be so with wife, it is not good to marry.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：这话不是人都能领受的，惟独赐给谁，谁才能领受。
chapters.en: But he said unto them, All cannot receive this saying, save to whom it is given.

chapters.zh: 因为有生来是阉人，也有被人阉的，并有为天国的缘故自阉的。这话谁能领受就可以领受。
chapters.en: For there are some eunuchs, which were so born from mother's womb: and there are some eunuchs, which were made eunuchs of men: and there be eunuchs, which have made themselves eunuchs for the kingdom of heaven's sake. He that is able to receive , let him receive .

chapters.zh: 那时，有人带著小孩子来见耶稣，要耶稣给他们按手祷告，门徒就责备那些人。
chapters.en: Then were there brought unto him little children, that he should put hands on them, and pray: and the disciples rebuked them.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：让小孩子到我这里来，不要禁止他们；因为在天国的，正是这样的人。
chapters.en: But Jesus said, Suffer little children, and forbid them not, to come unto me: for of such is the kingdom of heaven.

chapters.zh: 耶稣给他们按手，就离开那地方去了。
chapters.en: And he laid hands on them, and departed thence.

chapters.zh: 有一个人来见耶稣，说：夫子（有古卷：良善的夫子），我该做甚么善事才能得永生？
chapters.en: And, behold, one came and said unto him, Good Master, what good thing shall I do, that I may have eternal life?

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：你为甚么以善事问我呢？只有一位是善的（有古卷：你为什么称我是良善的？除了神以外，没有一个良善的）。你若要进入永生，就当遵守诫命。
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Why callest thou me good? none good but one, , God: but if thou wilt enter into life, keep the commandments.

chapters.zh: 他说：甚么诫命？耶稣说：就是不可杀人；不可奸淫；不可偷盗；不可作假见证；
chapters.en: He saith unto him, Which? Jesus said, Thou shalt do no murder, Thou shalt not commit adultery, Thou shalt not steal, Thou shalt not bear false witness,

chapters.zh: 当孝敬父母，又当爱人如己。
chapters.en: Honour thy father and mother: and, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.

chapters.zh: 那少年人说：这一切我都遵守了，还缺少甚么呢？
chapters.en: The young man saith unto him, All these things have I kept from my youth up: what lack I yet?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你若愿意作完全人，可去变卖你所有的，分给穷人，就必有财宝在天上；你还要来跟从我。
chapters.en: Jesus said unto him, If thou wilt be perfect, go sell that thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come follow me.

chapters.zh: 那少年人听见这话，就忧忧愁愁的走了，因为他的产业很多。
chapters.en: But when the young man heard that saying, he went away sorrowful: for he had great possessions.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对门徒说：我实在告诉你们，财主进天国是难的。
chapters.en: Then said Jesus unto his disciples, Verily I say unto you, That a rich man shall hardly enter into the kingdom of heaven.

chapters.zh: 我又告诉你们，骆驼穿过针的眼，比财主进神的国还容易呢！
chapters.en: And again I say unto you, It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.

chapters.zh: 门徒听见这话，就希奇得很，说：这样谁能得救呢？
chapters.en: When his disciples heard , they were exceedingly amazed, saying, Who then can be saved?

chapters.zh: 耶稣看著他们，说：在人这是不能的，在神凡事都能。
chapters.en: But Jesus beheld , and said unto them, With men this is impossible; but with God all things are possible.

chapters.zh: 彼得就对他说：看哪，我们已经撇下所有的跟从你，将来我们要得甚么呢？
chapters.en: Then answered Peter and said unto him, Behold, we have forsaken all, and followed thee; what shall we have therefore?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我实在告诉你们，你们这跟从我的人，到复兴的时候，人子坐在他荣耀的宝座上，你们也要坐在十二个宝座上，审判以色列十二个支派。
chapters.en: And Jesus said unto them, Verily I say unto you, That ye which have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of man shall sit in the throne of his glory, ye also shall sit upon twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.

chapters.zh: 凡为我的名撇下房屋，或是弟兄、姐妹、父亲、母亲、（有古卷在此有：妻子）儿女、田地的，必要得著百倍，并且承受永生。
chapters.en: And every one that hath forsaken houses, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my name's sake, shall receive an hundredfold, and shall inherit everlasting life.

chapters.zh: 然而，有许多在前的，将要在后；在后的，将要在前。
chapters.en: But many first shall be last; and the last first.

chapters.zh: 因为天国好像家主清早去雇人进他的葡萄园做工，
chapters.en: For the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man an householder, which went out early in the morning to hire labourers into his vineyard.

chapters.zh: 和工人讲定一天一钱银子，就打发他们进葡萄园去。
chapters.en: And when he had agreed with the labourers for a penny a day, he sent them into his vineyard.

chapters.zh: 约在巳初出去，看见市上还有闲站的人，
chapters.en: And he went out about the third hour, and saw others standing idle in the marketplace,

chapters.zh: 就对他们说：你们也进葡萄园去，所当给的，我必给你们。他们也进去了。
chapters.en: And said unto them; Go ye also into the vineyard, and whatsoever is right I will give you. And they went their way.

chapters.zh: 约在午正和申初又出去，也是这样行。
chapters.en: Again he went out about the sixth and ninth hour, and did likewise.

chapters.zh: 约在酉初出去，看见还有人站在那里，就问他们说：你们为甚么整天在这里闲站呢？
chapters.en: And about the eleventh hour he went out, and found others standing idle, and saith unto them, Why stand ye here all the day idle?

chapters.zh: 他们说：因为没有人雇我们。他说：你们也进葡萄园去。
chapters.en: They say unto him, Because no man hath hired us. He saith unto them, Go ye also into the vineyard; and whatsoever is right, shall ye receive.

chapters.zh: 到了晚上，园主对管事的说：叫工人都来，给他们工钱，从后来的起，到先来的为止。
chapters.en: So when even was come, the lord of the vineyard saith unto his steward, Call the labourers, and give them hire, beginning from the last unto the first.

chapters.zh: 约在酉初雇的人来了，各人得了一钱银子。
chapters.en: And when they came that about the eleventh hour, they received every man a penny.

chapters.zh: 及至那先雇的来了，他们以为必要多得；谁知也是各得一钱。
chapters.en: But when the first came, they supposed that they should have received more; and they likewise received every man a penny.

chapters.zh: 他们得了，就埋怨家主说：
chapters.en: And when they had received , they murmured against the goodman of the house,

chapters.zh: 我们整天劳苦受热，那后来的只做了一小时，你竟叫他们和我们一样么？
chapters.en: Saying, These last have wrought one hour, and thou hast made them equal unto us, which have borne the burden and heat of the day.

chapters.zh: 家主回答其中的一人说：朋友，我不亏负你，你与我讲定的不是一钱银子么？
chapters.en: But he answered one of them, and said, Friend, I do thee no wrong: didst not thou agree with me for a penny?

chapters.zh: 拿你的走罢！我给那后来的和给你一样，这是我愿意的。
chapters.en: Take thine , and go thy way: I will give unto this last, even as unto thee.

chapters.zh: 我的东西难道不可随我的意思用么？因为我作好人，你就红了眼么？
chapters.en: Is it not lawful for me to do what I will with mine own? Is thine eye evil, because I am good?

chapters.zh: 这样，那在后的，将要在前；在前的，将要在后了。（有古卷在此有：因为被召的人多，选上的人少。）
chapters.en: So the last shall be first, and the first last: for many be called, but few chosen.

chapters.zh: 耶稣上耶路撒冷去的时候，在路上把十二个门徒带到一边，对他们说：
chapters.en: And Jesus going up to Jerusalem took the twelve disciples apart in the way, and said unto them,

chapters.zh: 看哪，我们上耶路撒冷去，人子要被交给祭司长和文士。他们要定他死罪，
chapters.en: Behold, we go up to Jerusalem; and the Son of man shall be betrayed unto the chief priests and unto the scribes, and they shall condemn him to death,

chapters.zh: 又交给外邦人，将他戏弄，鞭打，钉在十字架上；第三日他要复活。
chapters.en: And shall deliver him to the Gentiles to mock, and to scourge, and to crucify : and the third day he shall rise again.

chapters.zh: 那时，西庇太儿子的母亲同他两个儿子上前来拜耶稣，求他一件事。
chapters.en: Then came to him the mother of Zebedee's children with her sons, worshipping , and desiring a certain thing of him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：你要甚么呢？他说：愿你叫我这两个儿子在你国里，一个坐在你右边，一个坐在你左边。
chapters.en: And he said unto her, What wilt thou? She saith unto him, Grant that these my two sons may sit, the one on thy right hand, and the other on the left, in thy kingdom.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：你们不知道所求的是甚么；我将要喝的杯，你们能喝么？他们说：我们能。
chapters.en: But Jesus answered and said, Ye know not what ye ask. Are ye able to drink of the cup that I shall drink of, and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with? They say unto him, We are able.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：我所喝的杯，你们必要喝；只是坐在我的左右，不是我可以赐的，乃是我父为谁预备的，就赐给谁。
chapters.en: And he saith unto them, Ye shall drink indeed of my cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with: but to sit on my right hand, and on my left, is not mine to give, but for whom it is prepared of my Father.

chapters.zh: 那十个门徒听见，就恼怒他们弟兄二人。
chapters.en: And when the ten heard , they were moved with indignation against the two brethren.

chapters.zh: 耶稣叫了他们来，说：你们知道外邦人有君王为主治理他们，有大臣操权管束他们。
chapters.en: But Jesus called them , and said, Ye know that the princes of the Gentiles exercise dominion over them, and they that are great exercise authority upon them.

chapters.zh: 只是在你们中间，不可这样；你们中间谁愿为大，就必作你们的用人；
chapters.en: But it shall not be so among you: but whosoever will be great among you, let him be your minister;

chapters.zh: 谁愿为首，就必作你们的仆人。
chapters.en: And whosoever will be chief among you, let him be your servant:

chapters.zh: 正如人子来，不是要受人的服事，乃是要服事人，并且要舍命，作多人的赎价。
chapters.en: Even as the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.

chapters.zh: 他们出耶利哥的时候，有极多的人跟随他。
chapters.en: And as they departed from Jericho, a great multitude followed him.

chapters.zh: 有两个瞎子坐在路旁，听说是耶稣经过，就喊著说：主阿，大卫的子孙，可怜我们罢！
chapters.en: And, behold, two blind men sitting by the way side, when they heard that Jesus passed by, cried out, saying, Have mercy on us, O Lord, Son of David.

chapters.zh: 众人责备他们，不许他们作声；他们却越发喊著说：主阿，大卫的子孙，可怜我们罢！
chapters.en: And the multitude rebuked them, because they should hold their peace: but they cried the more, saying, Have mercy on us, O Lord, Son of David.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就站住，叫他们来，说：要我为你们做甚么？
chapters.en: And Jesus stood still, and called them, and said, What will ye that I shall do unto you?

chapters.zh: 他们说：主阿，要我们的眼睛能看见！
chapters.en: They say unto him, Lord, that our eyes may be opened.

chapters.zh: 耶稣就动了慈心，把他们的眼睛一摸，他们立刻看见，就跟从了耶稣。
chapters.en: So Jesus had compassion , and touched their eyes: and immediately their eyes received sight, and they followed him.

chapters.zh: 耶稣和门徒将近耶路撒冷，到了伯法其，在橄榄山那里。
chapters.en: And when they drew nigh unto Jerusalem, and were come to Bethphage, unto the mount of Olives, then sent Jesus two disciples,

chapters.zh: 耶稣就打发两个门徒，对他们说：你们往对面村子里去，必看见一匹驴拴在那里，还有驴驹同在一处；你们解开，牵到我这里来。
chapters.en: Saying unto them, Go into the village over against you, and straightway ye shall find an ass tied, and a colt with her: loose , and bring unto me.

chapters.zh: 若有人对你们说甚么，你们就说：主要用他。那人必立时让你们牵来。
chapters.en: And if any say ought unto you, ye shall say, The Lord hath need of them; and straightway he will send them.

chapters.zh: 这事成就是要应验先知的话，说：
chapters.en: All this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophet, saying,

chapters.zh: 要对锡安的居民（原文是女子）说：看哪，你的王来到你这里，是温柔的，又骑著驴，就是骑著驴驹子。
chapters.en: Tell ye the daughter of Sion, Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, meek, and sitting upon an ass, and a colt the foal of an ass.

chapters.zh: 门徒就照耶稣所吩咐的去行，
chapters.en: And the disciples went, and did as Jesus commanded them,

chapters.zh: 牵了驴和驴驹来，把自己的衣服搭在上面，耶稣就骑上。
chapters.en: And brought the ass, and the colt, and put on them their clothes, and they set thereon.

chapters.zh: 众人多半把衣服铺在路上；还有人砍下树枝来铺在路上。
chapters.en: And a very great multitude spread their garments in the way; others cut down branches from the trees, and strawed in the way.

chapters.zh: 前行后随的众人喊著说：和散那（原有求救的意思，在此是称颂的话）归于大卫的子孙！奉主名来的是应当称颂的！高高在上和散那！
chapters.en: And the multitudes that went before, and that followed, cried, saying, Hosanna to the Son of David: Blessed he that cometh in the name of the Lord; Hosanna in the highest.

chapters.zh: 耶稣既进了耶路撒冷，合城都惊动了，说：这是谁？
chapters.en: And when he was come into Jerusalem, all the city was moved, saying, Who is this?

chapters.zh: 众人说：这是加利利拿撒勒的先知耶稣。
chapters.en: And the multitude said, This is Jesus the prophet of Nazareth of Galilee.

chapters.zh: 耶稣进了神的殿，赶出殿里一切作买卖的人，推倒兑换银钱之人的桌子，和卖鸽子之人的凳子；
chapters.en: And Jesus went into the temple of God, and cast out all them that sold and bought in the temple, and overthrew the tables of the moneychangers, and the seats of them that sold doves,

chapters.zh: 对他们说：经上记著说：我的殿必称为祷告的殿，你们倒使他成为贼窝了。
chapters.en: And said unto them, It is written, My house shall be called the house of prayer; but ye have made it a den of thieves.

chapters.zh: 在殿里有瞎子、瘸子到耶稣跟前，他就治好了他们 .。
chapters.en: And the blind and the lame came to him in the temple; and he healed them.

chapters.zh: 祭司长和文士看见耶稣所行的奇事，又见小孩子在殿里喊著说：和散那归于大卫的子孙！就甚恼怒，
chapters.en: And when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children crying in the temple, and saying, Hosanna to the Son of David; they were sore displeased,

chapters.zh: 对他说：这些人所说的，你听见了么？耶稣说：是的。经上说你从婴孩和吃奶的口中完全了赞美的话，你们没有念过么？
chapters.en: And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?

chapters.zh: 于是离开他们，出城到伯大尼去，在那里住宿。
chapters.en: And he left them, and went out of the city into Bethany; and he lodged there.

chapters.zh: 早晨回城的时候，他饿了，
chapters.en: Now in the morning as he returned into the city, he hungered.

chapters.zh: 看见路旁有一棵无花果树，就走到跟前，在树上找不著甚么，不过有叶子，就对树说：从今以后，你永不结果子。那无花果树就立刻枯干了。
chapters.en: And when he saw a fig tree in the way, he came to it, and found nothing thereon, but leaves only, and said unto it, Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward for ever. And presently the fig tree withered away.

chapters.zh: 门徒看见了 ﹐ 便希奇说：无花果树怎么立刻枯干了呢？
chapters.en: And when the disciples saw , they marvelled, saying, How soon is the fig tree withered away!

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我实在告诉你们，你们若有信心，不疑惑，不但能行无花果树上所行的事，就是对这座山说：你挪开此地，投在海里！也必成就。
chapters.en: Jesus answered and said unto them, Verily I say unto you, If ye have faith, and doubt not, ye shall not only do this to the fig tree, but also if ye shall say unto this mountain, Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea; it shall be done.

chapters.zh: 你们祷告，无论求甚么，只要信，就必得著。
chapters.en: And all things, whatsoever ye shall ask in prayer, believing, ye shall receive.

chapters.zh: 耶稣进了殿，正教训人的时候，祭司长和民间的长老来问他说：你仗著甚么权柄做这些事？给你这权柄的是谁呢？
chapters.en: And when he was come into the temple, the chief priests and the elders of the people came unto him as he was teaching, and said, By what authority doest thou these things? and who gave thee this authority?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：我也要问你们一句话，你们若告诉我，我就告诉你们我仗著甚么权柄做这些事。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered and said unto them, I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things.

chapters.zh: 约翰的洗礼是从那里来的？是从天上来的？是从人间来的呢？他们彼此商议说：我们若说从天上来，他必对我们说：这样，你们为甚么不信他呢？
chapters.en: The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men? And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say unto us, Why did ye not then believe him?

chapters.zh: 若说从人间来，我们又怕百姓，因为他们都以约翰为先知。
chapters.en: But if we shall say, Of men; we fear the people; for all hold John as a prophet.

chapters.zh: 于是回答耶稣说：我们不知道。耶稣说：我也不告诉你们我仗著甚么权柄做这些事。
chapters.en: And they answered Jesus, and said, We cannot tell. And he said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.

chapters.zh: 又说：一个人有两个儿子。他来对大儿子说：我儿，你今天到葡萄园里去做工。
chapters.en: But what think ye? A man had two sons; and he came to the first, and said, Son, go work to day in my vineyard.

chapters.zh: 他回答说：我不去，以后自己懊悔，就去了。
chapters.en: He answered and said, I will not: but afterward he repented, and went.

chapters.zh: 又来对小儿子也是这样说。他回答说：父阿，我去，他却不去。
chapters.en: And he came to the second, and said likewise. And he answered and said, I , sir: and went not.

chapters.zh: 你们想，这两个儿子是那一个遵行父命呢？他们说：大儿子。耶稣说：我实在告诉你们，税吏和娼妓倒比你们先进神的国。
chapters.en: Whether of them twain did the will of father? They say unto him, The first. Jesus saith unto them, Verily I say unto you, That the publicans and the harlots go into the kingdom of God before you.

chapters.zh: 因为约翰遵著义路到你们这里来，你们却不信他；税吏和娼妓倒信他。你们看见了，后来还是不懊悔去信他。
chapters.en: For John came unto you in the way of righteousness, and ye believed him not: but the publicans and the harlots believed him: and ye, when ye had seen , repented not afterward, that ye might believe him.

chapters.zh: 你们再听一个比喻：有个家主栽了一个葡萄园，周围圈上篱笆，里面挖了一个压酒池，盖了一座楼，租给园户，就往外国去了。
chapters.en: Hear another parable: There was a certain householder, which planted a vineyard, and hedged it round about, and digged a winepress in it, and built a tower, and let it out to husbandmen, and went into a far country:

chapters.zh: 收果子的时候近了，就打发仆人到园户那里去收果子。
chapters.en: And when the time of the fruit drew near, he sent his servants to the husbandmen, that they might receive the fruits of it.

chapters.zh: 园户拿住仆人，打了一个，杀了一个，用石头打死一个。
chapters.en: And the husbandmen took his servants, and beat one, and killed another, and stoned another.

chapters.zh: 主人又打发别的仆人去，比先前更多；园户还是照样待他们。
chapters.en: Again, he sent other servants more than the first: and they did unto them likewise.

chapters.zh: 后来打发他的儿子到他们那里去，意思说：他们必尊敬我的儿子。
chapters.en: But last of all he sent unto them his son, saying, They will reverence my son.

chapters.zh: 不料，园户看见他儿子，就彼此说：这是承受产业的。来罢，我们杀他，占他的产业！
chapters.en: But when the husbandmen saw the son, they said among themselves, This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and let us seize on his inheritance.

chapters.zh: 他们就拿住他，推出葡萄园外，杀了。
chapters.en: And they caught him, and cast out of the vineyard, and slew .

chapters.zh: 园主来的时候要怎样处治这些园户呢？
chapters.en: When the lord therefore of the vineyard cometh, what will he do unto those husbandmen?

chapters.zh: 他们说：要下毒手除灭那些恶人，将葡萄园另租给那按著时候交果子的园户。
chapters.en: They say unto him, He will miserably destroy those wicked men, and will let out vineyard unto other husbandmen, which shall render him the fruits in their seasons.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：经上写著：匠人所弃的石头已作了房角的头块石头。这是主所做的，在我们眼中看为希奇。这经你们没有念过么？
chapters.en: Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is the Lord's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes?

chapters.zh: 所以我告诉你们，神的国必从你们夺去，赐给那能结果子的百姓。
chapters.en: Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of God shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof.

chapters.zh: 谁掉在这石头上，必要跌碎；这石头掉在谁的身上，就要把谁砸得稀烂。
chapters.en: And whosoever shall fall on this stone shall be broken: but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder.

chapters.zh: 祭司长和法利赛人听见他的比喻，就看出他是指著他们说的。
chapters.en: And when the chief priests and Pharisees had heard his parables, they perceived that he spake of them.

chapters.zh: 他们想要捉拿他，只是怕众人，因为众人以他为先知。
chapters.en: But when they sought to lay hands on him, they feared the multitude, because they took him for a prophet.

chapters.zh: 耶稣又用比喻对他们说：
chapters.en: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a certain king, which made a marriage for his son,

chapters.zh: 天国好比一个王为他儿子摆设娶亲的筵席，
chapters.en: And sent forth his servants to call them that were bidden to the wedding: and they would not come.

chapters.zh: 就打发仆人去，请那些被召的人来赴席，他们却不肯来。
chapters.en: Again, he sent forth other servants, saying, Tell them which are bidden, Behold, I have prepared my dinner: my oxen and fatlings killed, and all things ready: come unto the marriage.

chapters.zh: 王又打发别的仆人，说：你们告诉那被召的人，我的筵席已经预备好了，牛和肥畜已经宰了，各样都齐备，请你们来赴席。
chapters.en: But they made light of , and went their ways, one to his farm, another to his merchandise:

chapters.zh: 那些人不理就走了；一个到自己田里去；一个作买卖去；
chapters.en: And the remnant took his servants, and entreated spitefully, and slew .

chapters.zh: 其余的拿住仆人，凌辱他们，把他们杀了。
chapters.en: But when the king heard , he was wroth: and he sent forth his armies, and destroyed those murderers, and burned up their city.

chapters.zh: 王就大怒，发兵除灭那些凶手，烧毁他们的城。
chapters.en: Then saith he to his servants, The wedding is ready, but they which were bidden were not worthy.

chapters.zh: 于是对仆人说：喜筵已经齐备，只是所召的人不配。
chapters.en: Go ye therefore into the highways, and as many as ye shall find, bid to the marriage.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要往岔路口上去，凡遇见的，都召来赴席。
chapters.en: So those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together all as many as they found, both bad and good: and the wedding was furnished with guests.

chapters.zh: 那些仆人就出去，到大路上，凡遇见的，不论善恶都召聚了来，筵席上就坐满了客。
chapters.en: And when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man which had not on a wedding garment:

chapters.zh: 王进来观看宾客，见那里有一个没有穿礼服的，
chapters.en: And he saith unto him, Friend, how camest thou in hither not having a wedding garment? And he was speechless.

chapters.zh: 就对他说：朋友，你到这里来怎么不穿礼服呢？那人无言可答。
chapters.en: Then said the king to the servants, Bind him hand and foot, and take him away, and cast into outer darkness; there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

chapters.zh: 于是王对使唤的人说：捆起他的手脚来，把他丢在外边的黑暗里；在那里必要哀哭切齿了。
chapters.en: For many are called, but few chosen.

chapters.zh: 因为被召的人多，选上的人少。
chapters.en: Then went the Pharisees, and took counsel how they might entangle him in talk.

chapters.zh: 当时，法利赛人出去商议，怎样就著耶稣的话陷害他，
chapters.en: And they sent out unto him their disciples with the Herodians, saying, Master, we know that thou art true, and teachest the way of God in truth, neither carest thou for any : for thou regardest not the person of men.

chapters.zh: 就打发他们的门徒同希律党的人去见耶稣，说：夫子，我们知道你是诚实人，并且诚诚实实传神的道，甚么人你都不徇情面，因为你不看人的外貌。
chapters.en: Tell us therefore, What thinkest thou? Is it lawful to give tribute unto Caesar, or not?

chapters.zh: 请告诉我们，你的意见如何？纳税给该撒可以不可以？
chapters.en: But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, Why tempt ye me, hypocrites?

chapters.zh: 耶稣看出他们的恶意，就说：假冒为善的人哪，为甚么试探我？
chapters.en: Shew me the tribute money. And they brought unto him a penny.

chapters.zh: 拿一个上税的钱给我看！他们就拿一个银钱来给他。
chapters.en: And he saith unto them, Whose this image and superscription?

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：这像和这号是谁的？
chapters.en: They say unto him, Caesar's. Then saith he unto them, Render therefore unto Caesar the things which are Caesar's; and unto God the things that are God's.

chapters.zh: 他们说：是该撒的。耶稣说：这样，该撒的物当归给该撒；神的物当归给神。
chapters.en: When they had heard , they marvelled, and left him, and went their way.

chapters.zh: 他们听见就希奇，离开他走了。
chapters.en: The same day came to him the Sadducees, which say that there is no resurrection, and asked him,

chapters.zh: 撒都该人常说没有复活的事。那天，他们来问耶稣说：
chapters.en: Saying, Master, Moses said, If a man die, having no children, his brother shall marry his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother.

chapters.zh: 夫子，摩西说：人若死了，没有孩子，他兄弟当娶他的妻，为哥哥生子立后。
chapters.en: Now there were with us seven brethren: and the first, when he had married a wife, deceased, and, having no issue, left his wife unto his brother:

chapters.zh: 从前，在我们这里有弟兄七人，第一个娶了妻，死了，没有孩子，撇下妻子给兄弟。
chapters.en: Likewise the second also, and the third, unto the seventh.

chapters.zh: 第二、第三、直到第七个，都是如此。
chapters.en: And last of all the woman died also.

chapters.zh: 末后，妇人也死了。
chapters.en: Therefore in the resurrection whose wife shall she be of the seven? for they all had her.

chapters.zh: 这样，当复活的时候，他是七个人中那一个的妻子呢？因为他们都娶过他。
chapters.en: Jesus answered and said unto them, Ye do err, not knowing the scriptures, nor the power of God.

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：你们错了；因为不明白圣经，也不晓得神的大能。
chapters.en: For in the resurrection they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are as the angels of God in heaven.

chapters.zh: 当复活的时候，人也不娶也不嫁，乃像天上的使者一样。
chapters.en: But as touching the resurrection of the dead, have ye not read that which was spoken unto you by God, saying,

chapters.zh: 论到死人复活，神在经上向你们所说的，你们没有念过么？
chapters.en: I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob? God is not the God of the dead, but of the living.

chapters.zh: 他说：我是亚伯拉罕的神，以撒的神，雅各的神。神不是死人的神，乃是活人的神。
chapters.en: And when the multitude heard , they were astonished at his doctrine.

chapters.zh: 众人听见这话，就希奇他的教训。
chapters.en: But when the Pharisees had heard that he had put the Sadducees to silence, they were gathered together.

chapters.zh: 法利赛人听见耶稣堵住了撒都该人的口，他们就聚集。
chapters.en: Then one of them, a lawyer, asked , tempting him, and saying,

chapters.zh: 内中有一个人是律法师，要试探耶稣，就问他说：
chapters.en: Master, which the great commandment in the law?

chapters.zh: 夫子，律法上的诫命，那一条是最大的呢？
chapters.en: Jesus said unto him, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他说：你要尽心、尽性、尽意爱主 ─ 你的神。
chapters.en: This is the first and great commandment.

chapters.zh: 这是诫命中的第一，且是最大的。
chapters.en: And the second like unto it, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.

chapters.zh: 其次也相倣，就是要爱人如己。
chapters.en: On these two commandments hang all the law and the prophets.

chapters.zh: 这两条诫命是律法和先知一切道理的总纲。
chapters.en: While the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them,

chapters.zh: 法利赛人聚集的时候，耶稣问他们说：
chapters.en: Saying, What think ye of Christ? whose son is he? They say unto him, of David.

chapters.zh: 论到基督，你们的意见如何？他是谁的子孙呢？他们回答说：是大卫的子孙。
chapters.en: He saith unto them, How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶稣说：这样，大卫被圣灵感动，怎么还称他为主，说：
chapters.en: The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool?

chapters.zh: 主对我主说：你坐在我的右边，等我把你仇敌放在你的脚下。
chapters.en: If David then call him Lord, how is he his son?

chapters.zh: 大卫既称他为主，他怎么又是大卫的子孙呢？
chapters.en: And no man was able to answer him a word, neither durst any from that day forth ask him any more .

chapters.zh: 他们没有一个人能回答一言。从那日以后，也没有人敢再问他甚么。
那时 ﹐ 耶稣对众人和门徒讲论，
chapters.en: Then spake Jesus to the multitude, and to his disciples,

chapters.zh: 说：文士和法利赛人坐在摩西的位上，
chapters.en: Saying, The scribes and the Pharisees sit in Moses' seat:

chapters.zh: 凡他们所吩咐你们的，你们都要谨守遵行；但不要效法他们的行为；因为他们能说，不能行。
chapters.en: All therefore whatsoever they bid you observe, observe and do; but do not ye after their works: for they say, and do not.

chapters.zh: 他们把难担的重担捆起来，搁在人的肩上，但自己一个指头也不肯动。
chapters.en: For they bind heavy burdens and grievous to be borne, and lay on men's shoulders; but they will not move them with one of their fingers.

chapters.zh: 他们一切所做的事都是要叫人看见，所以将佩戴的经文做宽了，衣裳的 䍁 子做长了，
chapters.en: But all their works they do for to be seen of men: they make broad their phylacteries, and enlarge the borders of their garments,

chapters.zh: 喜爱筵席上的首座，会堂里的高位，
chapters.en: And love the uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in the synagogues,

chapters.zh: 又喜爱人在街市上问他安，称呼他拉比（拉比就是夫子）。
chapters.en: And greetings in the markets, and to be called of men, Rabbi, Rabbi.

chapters.zh: 但你们不要受拉比的称呼，因为只有一位是你们的夫子；你们都是弟兄。
chapters.en: But be not ye called Rabbi: for one is your Master, Christ; and all ye are brethren.

chapters.zh: 也不要称呼地上的人为父，因为只有一位是你们的父，就是在天上的父。
chapters.en: And call no your father upon the earth: for one is your Father, which is in heaven.

chapters.zh: 也不要受师尊的称呼，因为只有一位是你们的师尊，就是基督。
chapters.en: Neither be ye called masters: for one is your Master, Christ.

chapters.zh: 你们中间谁为大，谁就要作你们的用人。
chapters.en: But he that is greatest among you shall be your servant.

chapters.zh: 凡自高的，必降为卑；自卑的，必升为高。
chapters.en: And whosoever shall exalt himself shall be abased; and he that shall humble himself shall be exalted.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们正当人前，把天国的门关了，自己不进去，正要进去的人，你们也不容他们进去。（有古卷在此有
chapters.en: But woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye shut up the kingdom of heaven against men: for ye neither go in , neither suffer ye them that are entering to go in.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们侵吞寡妇的家产，假意做很长的祷告，所以要受更重的刑罚。）
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayer: therefore ye shall receive the greater damnation.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们走遍洋海陆地，勾引一个人入教，既入了教，却使他作地狱之子，比你们还加倍。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye compass sea and land to make one proselyte, and when he is made, ye make him twofold more the child of hell than yourselves.

chapters.zh: 你们这瞎眼领路的有祸了！你们说：凡指著殿起誓的，这算不得甚么；只是凡指著殿中金子起誓的，他就该谨守。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, blind guides, which say, Whosoever shall swear by the temple, it is nothing; but whosoever shall swear by the gold of the temple, he is a debtor!

chapters.zh: 你们这无知瞎眼的人哪，甚么是大的？是金子呢？还是叫金子成圣的殿呢？
chapters.en: fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gold, or the temple that sanctifieth the gold?

chapters.zh: 你们又说：凡指著坛起誓的，这算不得甚么；只是凡指著坛上礼物起誓的，他就该谨守。
chapters.en: And, Whosoever shall swear by the altar, it is nothing; but whosoever sweareth by the gift that is upon it, he is guilty.

chapters.zh: 你们这瞎眼的人哪，甚么是大的？是礼物呢？还是叫礼物成圣的坛呢？
chapters.en: fools and blind: for whether greater, the gift, or the altar that sanctifieth the gift?

chapters.zh: 所以，人指著坛起誓，就是指著坛和坛上一切所有的起誓；
chapters.en: Whoso therefore shall swear by the altar, sweareth by it, and by all things thereon.

chapters.zh: 人指著殿起誓，就是指著殿和那住在殿里的起誓；
chapters.en: And whoso shall swear by the temple, sweareth by it, and by him that dwelleth therein.

chapters.zh: 人指著天起誓，就是指著神的宝座和那坐在上面的起誓。
chapters.en: And he that shall swear by heaven, sweareth by the throne of God, and by him that sitteth thereon.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们将薄荷、茴香、芹菜，献上十分之一，那律法上更重的事，就是公义、怜悯、信实，反倒不行了。这更重的是你们当行的；那也是不可不行的。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye pay tithe of mint and anise and cummin, and have omitted the weightier of the law, judgment, mercy, and faith: these ought ye to have done, and not to leave the other undone.

chapters.zh: 你们这瞎眼领路的，蠓虫你们就滤出来，骆驼你们倒吞下去。
chapters.en: blind guides, which strain at a gnat, and swallow a camel.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们洗净杯盘的外面，里面却盛满了勒索和放荡。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye make clean the outside of the cup and of the platter, but within they are full of extortion and excess.

chapters.zh: 你这瞎眼的法利赛人，先洗净杯盘的里面，好叫外面也干净了。
chapters.en: blind Pharisee, cleanse first that within the cup and platter, that the outside of them may be clean also.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们好像粉饰的坟墓，外面好看，里面却装满了死人的骨头和一切的污秽。
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which indeed appear beautiful outward, but are within full of dead bones, and of all uncleanness.

chapters.zh: 你们也是如此，在人前，外面显出公义来，里面却装满了假善和不法的事。
chapters.en: Even so ye also outwardly appear righteous unto men, but within ye are full of hypocrisy and iniquity.

chapters.zh: 你们这假冒为善的文士和法利赛人有祸了！因为你们建造先知的坟，修饰义人的墓，说：
chapters.en: Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! because ye build the tombs of the prophets, and garnish the sepulchres of the righteous,

chapters.zh: 若是我们在我们祖宗的时候，必不和他们同流先知的血。
chapters.en: And say, If we had been in the days of our fathers, we would not have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets.

chapters.zh: 这就是你们自己证明是杀害先知者的子孙了。
chapters.en: Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets.

chapters.zh: 你们去充满你们祖宗的恶贯罢！
chapters.en: Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers.

chapters.zh: 你们这些蛇类、毒蛇之种阿，怎能逃脱地狱 ? 的刑罚呢？
chapters.en: serpents, generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell?

chapters.zh: 所以我差遣先知和智慧人并文士到你们这里来，有的你们要杀害，要钉十字架；有的你们要在会堂里鞭打，从这城追逼到那城，
chapters.en: Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and of them ye shall kill and crucify; and of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute from city to city:

chapters.zh: 叫世上所流义人的血都归到你们身上，从义人亚伯的血起，直到你们在殿和坛中间所杀的巴拉加的儿子撒迦利亚的血为止。
chapters.en: That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，这一切的罪都要归到这世代了。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation.

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷阿，耶路撒冷阿，你常杀害先知，又用石头打死那奉差遣到你这里来的人。我多次愿意聚集你的儿女，好像母鸡把小鸡聚集在翅膀底下，只是你们不愿意。
chapters.en: O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under wings, and ye would not!

chapters.zh: 看哪，你们的家成为荒场留给你们。
chapters.en: Behold, your house is left unto you desolate.

chapters.zh: 我告诉你们，从今以后，你们不得再见我，直等到你们说：奉主名来的是应当称颂的。
chapters.en: For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed he that cometh in the name of the Lord.

chapters.zh: 耶稣出了圣殿，正走的时候，门徒进前来，把殿宇指给他看。
chapters.en: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to for to shew him the buildings of the temple.

chapters.zh: 耶稣对他们说：你们不是看见这殿宇么？我实在告诉你们，将来在这里没有一块石头留在石头上，不被拆毁了。
chapters.en: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.

chapters.zh: 耶稣在橄榄山上坐著，门徒暗暗的来说：请告诉我们，甚么时候有这些事？你降临和世界的末了有甚么豫兆呢？
chapters.en: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?

chapters.zh: 耶稣回答说：你们要谨慎，免得有人迷惑你们。
chapters.en: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Take heed that no man deceive you.

chapters.zh: 因为将来有好些人冒我的名来，说：我是基督，并且要迷惑许多人。
chapters.en: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.

chapters.zh: 你们也要听见打仗和打仗的风声，总不要惊慌；因为这些事是必须有的，只是末期还没有到。
chapters.en: And ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars: see that ye be not troubled: for all must come to pass, but the end is not yet.

chapters.zh: 民要攻打民，国要攻打国；多处必有饥荒、地震。
chapters.en: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be famines, and pestilences, and earthquakes, in divers places.

chapters.zh: 这都是灾难（灾难：原文是生产之难）的起头。
chapters.en: All these the beginning of sorrows.

chapters.zh: 那时，人要把你们陷在患难里，也要杀害你们；你们又要为我的名被万民恨恶。
chapters.en: Then shall they deliver you up to be afflicted, and shall kill you: and ye shall be hated of all nations for my name's sake.

chapters.zh: 那时，必有许多人跌倒，也要彼此陷害，彼此恨恶；
chapters.en: And then shall many be offended, and shall betray one another, and shall hate one another.

chapters.zh: 且有好些假先知起来，迷惑多人。
chapters.en: And many false prophets shall rise, and shall deceive many.

chapters.zh: 只因不法的事增多，许多人的爱心才渐渐冷淡了。
chapters.en: And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.

chapters.zh: 惟有忍耐到底的，必然得救。
chapters.en: But he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.

chapters.zh: 这天国的福音要传遍天下，对万民作见证，然后末期才来到。
chapters.en: And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come.

chapters.zh: 你们看见先知但以理所说的那行毁坏可憎的站在圣地（读这经的人须要会意）。
chapters.en: When ye therefore shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, stand in the holy place, (whoso readeth, let him understand:)

chapters.zh: 那时，在犹太的，应当逃到山上；
chapters.en: Then let them which be in Judaea flee into the mountains:

chapters.zh: 在房上的，不要下来拿家里的东西；
chapters.en: Let him which is on the housetop not come down to take any thing out of his house:

chapters.zh: 在田里的，也不要回去取衣裳。
chapters.en: Neither let him which is in the field return back to take his clothes.

chapters.zh: 当那些日子，怀孕的和奶孩子的有祸了。
chapters.en: And woe unto them that are with child, and to them that give suck in those days!

chapters.zh: 你们应当祈求，叫你们逃走的时候，不遇见冬天或是安息日。
chapters.en: But pray ye that your flight be not in the winter, neither on the sabbath day:

chapters.zh: 因为那时必有大灾难，从世界的起头直到如今，没有这样的灾难，后来也必没有。
chapters.en: For then shall be great tribulation, such as was not since the beginning of the world to this time, no, nor ever shall be.

chapters.zh: 若不减少那日子，凡有血气的总没有一个得救的；只是为选民，那日子必减少了。
chapters.en: And except those days should be shortened, there should no flesh be saved: but for the elect's sake those days shall be shortened.

chapters.zh: 那时，若有人对你们说：基督在这里，或说：基督在那里，你们不要信！
chapters.en: Then if any man shall say unto you, Lo, here Christ, or there; believe not.

chapters.zh: 因为假基督、假先知将要起来，显大神迹、大奇事，倘若能行，连选民也就迷惑了。
chapters.en: For there shall arise false Christs, and false prophets, and shall shew great signs and wonders; insomuch that, if possible, they shall deceive the very elect.

chapters.zh: 看哪，我预先告诉你们了。
chapters.en: Behold, I have told you before.

chapters.zh: 若有人对你们说：看哪，基督在旷野里，你们不要出去！或说：看哪，基督在内屋中，你们不要信！
chapters.en: Wherefore if they shall say unto you, Behold, he is in the desert; go not forth: behold, in the secret chambers; believe not.

chapters.zh: 闪电从东边发出，直照到西边。人子降临，也要这样。
chapters.en: For as the lightning cometh out of the east, and shineth even unto the west; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.

chapters.zh: 尸首在那里，鹰也必聚在那里。
chapters.en: For wheresoever the carcase is, there will the eagles be gathered together.

chapters.zh: 那些日子的灾难一过去，日头就变黑了，月亮也不放光，众星要从天上坠落，天势都要震动。
chapters.en: Immediately after the tribulation of those days shall the sun be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light, and the stars shall fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens shall be shaken:

chapters.zh: 那时，人子的兆头要显在天上，地上的万族都要哀哭。他们要看见人子，有能力，有大荣耀 .，驾著天上的云降临。
chapters.en: And then shall appear the sign of the Son of man in heaven: and then shall all the tribes of the earth mourn, and they shall see the Son of man coming in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.

chapters.zh: 他要差遣使者，用号筒的大声，将他的选民，从四方（方：原文是风），从天这边到天那边，都招聚了来。
chapters.en: And he shall send his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.

chapters.zh: 你们可以从无花果树学个比方：当树枝发嫩长叶的时候，你们就知道夏天近了。
chapters.en: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When his branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer nigh:

chapters.zh: 这样，你们看见这一切的事，也该知道人子近了，正在门口了。
chapters.en: So likewise ye, when ye shall see all these things, know that it is near, at the doors.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，这世代还没有过去，这些事都要成就。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass, till all these things be fulfilled.

chapters.zh: 天地要废去，我的话却不能废去。
chapters.en: Heaven and earth shall pass away, but my words shall not pass away.

chapters.zh: 那日子，那时辰，没有人知道，连天上的使者也不知道，子也不知道，惟独父知道。
chapters.en: But of that day and hour knoweth no , no, not the angels of heaven, but my Father only.

chapters.zh: 挪亚的日子怎样，人子降临也要怎样。
chapters.en: But as the days of Noe , so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.

chapters.zh: 当洪水以前的日子，人照常吃喝嫁娶，直到挪亚进方舟的那日；
chapters.en: For as in the days that were before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noe entered into the ark,

chapters.zh: 不知不觉洪水来了，把他们全都冲去。人子降临也要这样。
chapters.en: And knew not until the flood came, and took them all away; so shall also the coming of the Son of man be.

chapters.zh: 那时，两个人在田里，取去一个，撇下一个。
chapters.en: Then shall two be in the field; the one shall be taken, and the other left.

chapters.zh: 两个女人推磨，取去一个，撇下一个。
chapters.en: Two grinding at the mill; the one shall be taken, and the other left.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要儆醒，因为不知道你们的主是那一天来到。
chapters.en: Watch therefore: for ye know not what hour your Lord doth come.

chapters.zh: 家主若知道几更天有贼来，就必儆醒，不容人挖透房屋；这是你们所知道的。
chapters.en: But know this, that if the goodman of the house had known in what watch the thief would come, he would have watched, and would not have suffered his house to be broken up.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们也要预备，因为你们想不到的时候，人子就来了。
chapters.en: Therefore be ye also ready: for in such an hour as ye think not the Son of man cometh.

chapters.zh: 谁是忠心有见识的仆人，为主人所派，管理家里的人，按时分粮给他们呢？
chapters.en: Who then is a faithful and wise servant, whom his lord hath made ruler over his household, to give them meat in due season?

chapters.zh: 主人来到，看见他这样行，那仆人就有福了。
chapters.en: Blessed that servant, whom his lord when he cometh shall find so doing.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，主人要派他管理一切所有的。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, That he shall make him ruler over all his goods.

chapters.zh: 倘若那恶仆心里说：我的主人必来得迟，
chapters.en: But and if that evil servant shall say in his heart, My lord delayeth his coming;

chapters.zh: 就动手打他的同伴，又和酒醉的人一同吃喝。
chapters.en: And shall begin to smite fellowservants, and to eat and drink with the drunken;

chapters.zh: 在想不到的日子，不知道的时辰，那仆人的主人要来，
chapters.en: The lord of that servant shall come in a day when he looketh not for , and in an hour that he is not aware of,

chapters.zh: 重重的处治他（或作：把他腰斩了），定他和假冒为善的人同罪；在那里必要哀哭切齿了。
chapters.en: And shall cut him asunder, and appoint his portion with the hypocrites: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

chapters.zh: 那时，天国好比十个童女拿著灯出去迎接新郎。
chapters.en: Then shall the kingdom of heaven be likened unto ten virgins, which took their lamps, and went forth to meet the bridegroom.

chapters.zh: 其中有五个是愚拙的，五个是聪明的。
chapters.en: And five of them were wise, and five foolish.

chapters.zh: 愚拙的拿著灯，却不预备油；
chapters.en: They that foolish took their lamps, and took no oil with them:

chapters.zh: 聪明的拿著灯，又预备油在器皿里。
chapters.en: But the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps.

chapters.zh: 新郎迟延的时候，他们都打盹，睡著了。
chapters.en: While the bridegroom tarried, they all slumbered and slept.

chapters.zh: 半夜有人喊著说：新郎来了，你们出来迎接他！
chapters.en: And at midnight there was a cry made, Behold, the bridegroom cometh; go ye out to meet him.

chapters.zh: 那些童女就都起来收拾灯。
chapters.en: Then all those virgins arose, and trimmed their lamps.

chapters.zh: 愚拙的对聪明的说：请分点油给我们，因为我们的灯要灭了。
chapters.en: And the foolish said unto the wise, Give us of your oil; for our lamps are gone out.

chapters.zh: 聪明的回答说：恐怕不够你我用的；不如你们自己到卖油的那里去买罢。
chapters.en: But the wise answered, saying, ; lest there be not enough for us and you: but go ye rather to them that sell, and buy for yourselves.

chapters.zh: 他们去买的时候，新郎到了。那预备好了的，同他进去坐席，门就关了。
chapters.en: And while they went to buy, the bridegroom came; and they that were ready went in with him to the marriage: and the door was shut.

chapters.zh: 其余的童女随后也来了，说：主阿，主阿，给我们开门！
chapters.en: Afterward came also the other virgins, saying, Lord, Lord, open to us.

chapters.zh: 他却回答说：我实在告诉你们，我不认识你们。
chapters.en: But he answered and said, Verily I say unto you, I know you not.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要儆醒；因为那日子，那时辰，你们不知道。
chapters.en: Watch therefore, for ye know neither the day nor the hour wherein the Son of man cometh.

chapters.zh: 天国又好比一个人要往外国去，就叫了仆人来，把他的家业交给他们，
chapters.en: For as a man travelling into a far country, called his own servants, and delivered unto them his goods.

chapters.zh: 按著各人的才干给他们银子：一个给了五千，一个给了二千，一个给了一千，就往外国去了。
chapters.en: And unto one he gave five talents, to another two, and to another one; to every man according to his several ability; and straightway took his journey.

chapters.zh: 那领五千的随即拿去做买卖，另外赚了五千。
chapters.en: Then he that had received the five talents went and traded with the same, and made other five talents.

chapters.zh: 那领二千的也照样另赚了二千。
chapters.en: And likewise he that two, he also gained other two.

chapters.zh: 但那领一千的去掘开地，把主人的银子埋藏了。
chapters.en: But he that had received one went and digged in the earth, and hid his lord's money.

chapters.zh: 过了许久，那些仆人的主人来了，和他们算账。
chapters.en: After a long time the lord of those servants cometh, and reckoneth with them.

chapters.zh: 那领五千银子的又带著那另外的五千来，说：主阿，你交给我五千银子。请看，我又赚了五千。
chapters.en: And so he that had received five talents came and brought other five talents, saying, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me five talents: behold, I have gained beside them five talents more.

chapters.zh: 主人说：好，你这又良善又忠心的仆人，你在不多的事上有忠心，我要把许多事派你管理；可以进来享受你主人的快乐。
chapters.en: His lord said unto him, Well done, good and faithful servant: thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord.

chapters.zh: 那领二千的也来，说：主阿，你交给我二千银子。请看，我又赚了二千。
chapters.en: He also that had received two talents came and said, Lord, thou deliveredst unto me two talents: behold, I have gained two other talents beside them.

chapters.zh: 主人说：好，你这又良善又忠心的仆人，你在不多的事上有忠心，我要把许多事派你管理；可以进来享受你主人的快乐。
chapters.en: His lord said unto him, Well done, good and faithful servant; thou hast been faithful over a few things, I will make thee ruler over many things: enter thou into the joy of thy lord.

chapters.zh: 那领一千的也来，说：主阿，我知道你是忍心的人，没有种的地方要收割，没有散的地方要聚敛，
chapters.en: Then he which had received the one talent came and said, Lord, I knew thee that thou art an hard man, reaping where thou hast not sown, and gathering where thou hast not strawed:

chapters.zh: 我就害怕，去把你的一千银子埋藏在地里。请看，你的原银子在这里。
chapters.en: And I was afraid, and went and hid thy talent in the earth: lo, thou hast thine.

chapters.zh: 主人回答说：你这又恶又懒的仆人，你既知道我没有种的地方要收割，没有散的地方要聚敛，
chapters.en: His lord answered and said unto him, wicked and slothful servant, thou knewest that I reap where I sowed not, and gather where I have not strawed:

chapters.zh: 就当把我的银子放给兑换银钱的人，到我来的时候，可以连本带利收回。
chapters.en: Thou oughtest therefore to have put my money to the exchangers, and at my coming I should have received mine own with usury.

chapters.zh: 夺过他这一千来，给那有一万的。
chapters.en: Take therefore the talent from him, and give unto him which hath ten talents.

chapters.zh: 因为凡有的，还要加给他，叫他有余；没有的，连他所有的也要夺过来。
chapters.en: For unto every one that hath shall be given, and he shall have abundance: but from him that hath not shall be taken away even that which he hath.

chapters.zh: 把这无用的仆人丢在外面黑暗里；在那里必要哀哭切齿了。
chapters.en: And cast ye the unprofitable servant into outer darkness: there shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

chapters.zh: 当人子在他荣耀里、同著众天使降临的时候，要坐在他荣耀的宝座上。
chapters.en: When the Son of man shall come in his glory, and all the holy angels with him, then shall he sit upon the throne of his glory:

chapters.zh: 万民都要聚集在他面前。他要把他们分别出来，好像牧羊的分别绵羊山羊一般，
chapters.en: And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth sheep from the goats:

chapters.zh: 把绵羊安置在右边，山羊在左边。
chapters.en: And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left.

chapters.zh: 于是王要向那右边的说：你们这蒙我父赐福的，可来承受那创世以来为你们所预备的国；
chapters.en: Then shall the King say unto them on his right hand, Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world:

chapters.zh: 因为我饿了，你们给我吃，渴了，你们给我喝；我作客旅，你们留我住；
chapters.en: For I was an hungred, and ye gave me meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me drink: I was a stranger, and ye took me in:

chapters.zh: 我赤身露体，你们给我穿；我病了、你们看顾我；我在监里，你们来看我。
chapters.en: Naked, and ye clothed me: I was sick, and ye visited me: I was in prison, and ye came unto me.

chapters.zh: 义人就回答说：主阿，我们甚么时候见你饿了，给你吃，渴了，给你喝？
chapters.en: Then shall the righteous answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, and fed ? or thirsty, and gave drink?

chapters.zh: 甚么时候见你作客旅，留你住，或是赤身露体，给你穿？
chapters.en: When saw we thee a stranger, and took in? or naked, and clothed ?

chapters.zh: 又甚么时候见你病了，或是在监里，来看你呢？
chapters.en: Or when saw we thee sick, or in prison, and came unto thee?

chapters.zh: 王要回答说：我实在告诉你们，这些事你们既做在我这弟兄中一个最小的身上，就是做在我身上了。
chapters.en: And the King shall answer and say unto them, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye have done unto one of the least of these my brethren, ye have done unto me.

chapters.zh: 王又要向那左边的说：你们这被咒诅的人，离开我！进入那为魔鬼和他的使者所预备的永火里去！
chapters.en: Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the devil and his angels:

chapters.zh: 因为我饿了，你们不给我吃，渴了，你们不给我喝；
chapters.en: For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink:

chapters.zh: 我作客旅，你们不留我住；我赤身露体，你们不给我穿；我病了，我在监里，你们不来看顾我。
chapters.en: I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not.

chapters.zh: 他们也要回答说：主阿，我们甚么时候见你饿了，或渴了，或作客旅，或赤身露体，或病了，或在监里，不伺候你呢？
chapters.en: Then shall they also answer him, saying, Lord, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee?

chapters.zh: 王要回答说：我实在告诉你们，这些事你们既不做在我这弟兄中一个最小的身上，就是不做在我身上了。
chapters.en: Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did not to one of the least of these, ye did not to me.

chapters.zh: 这些人要往永刑里去；那些义人要往永生里去。
chapters.en: And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.

chapters.zh: 耶稣说完了这一切的话，就对门徒说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jesus had finished all these sayings, he said unto his disciples,

chapters.zh: 你们知道，过两天是逾越节，人子将要被交给人，钉在十字架上。
chapters.en: Ye know that after two days is the passover, and the Son of man is betrayed to be crucified.

chapters.zh: 那时，祭司长和民间的长老聚集在大祭司称为该亚法的院里。
chapters.en: Then assembled together the chief priests, and the scribes, and the elders of the people, unto the palace of the high priest, who was called Caiaphas,

chapters.zh: 大家商议要用诡计拿住耶稣，杀他，
chapters.en: And consulted that they might take Jesus by subtilty, and kill .

chapters.zh: 只是说：当节的日子不可，恐怕民间生乱。
chapters.en: But they said, Not on the feast , lest there be an uproar among the people.

chapters.zh: 耶稣在伯大尼长大痲疯的西门家里，
chapters.en: Now when Jesus was in Bethany, in the house of Simon the leper,

chapters.zh: 有一个女人拿著一玉瓶极贵的香膏来，趁耶稣坐席的时候，浇在他的头上。
chapters.en: There came unto him a woman having an alabaster box of very precious ointment, and poured it on his head, as he sat .

chapters.zh: 门徒看见就很不喜悦，说：何用这样的枉费呢！
chapters.en: But when his disciples saw , they had indignation, saying, To what purpose this waste?

chapters.zh: 这香膏可以卖许多钱，赒济穷人。
chapters.en: For this ointment might have been sold for much, and given to the poor.

chapters.zh: 耶稣看出他们的意思，就说：为甚么难为这女人呢？他在我身上做的是一件美事。
chapters.en: When Jesus understood , he said unto them, Why trouble ye the woman? for she hath wrought a good work upon me.

chapters.zh: 因为常有穷人和你们同在；只是你们不常有我。
chapters.en: For ye have the poor always with you; but me ye have not always.

chapters.zh: 他将这香膏浇在我身上是为我安葬做的。
chapters.en: For in that she hath poured this ointment on my body, she did for my burial.

chapters.zh: 我实在告诉你们，普天之下，无论在甚么地方传这福音，也要述说这女人所行的，作个纪念。
chapters.en: Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached in the whole world, shall also this, that this woman hath done, be told for a memorial of her.

chapters.zh: 当下，十二门徒里有一个称为加略人犹大的，去见祭司长，
chapters.en: Then one of the twelve, called Judas Iscariot, went unto the chief priests,
